GitHub

Types

EulerAP.FluxPair — Type
FluxPair{FX,FY}

Container for a pair of numerical flux functions. flux_x is used for vertical interfaces and flux_y is used for horizontal interfaces.

source
EulerAP.RelaxationParams — Type
RelaxationParams

Model and grid parameters for the 2D relaxation-Euler problem.

source
EulerAP.ImplicitStepData — Type
ImplicitStepData

Mutable container passed through the nonlinear solver for one backward-Euler step.

source
EulerAP.RunStats — Type
RunStats

Timing and allocation statistics collected while advancing the solution.

source
EulerAP.RunStats — Method
RunStats(nsteps::Int)

Create an empty statistics container sized for nsteps time steps.

source
